---
name: Replication report
about: You ran the model chains (or a port of them) — tell us what happened, especially if the numbers DIDN'T match
title: "Replication: <chain> on <platform>"
labels: replication
---

     contributions this project can receive. Whatever the outcome,
     thank you — your row goes into REPLICATIONS.md. -->

- numpy version:

**Result**

**Notes**
